title: Crumbly Ethiopian Nut Crumble
description: A nutty and crumbly solo-dinner dish from Ethiopia, vegan-friendly and jain-friendly with canola oil as the cooking medium.
instructions: In a pan over medium heat, toast almonds and pecans for about 2 minutes until lightly golden.
Add cashews, safflower seeds, and canola oil into the pan. Stir well to combine.
Reduce heat to low and continue stirring until mixture starts forming crumbs. Remove from heat.
Transfer crumbly mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Press down firmly with your fingers to form a compact layer.
Bake in oven for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown. Allow cooling before serving.
